title: elleanthus aureus
intro: Elleanthus aureus, also known as golden elleanthus, is a flowering plant species within the family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Elleanthus aureus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and its roots and leaves can be used to create medicinal extracts and tinctures.
